name: Monte Cristo Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the deep fat fryer.
2. Beat the egg until it lightens. Add a dash of milk.
3. Form the sandwich by placing one slice of cheese on each slice of bread and adding the ham slice.
4. Spread mustard on the ham.
5. Add the chicken slice (if making a "triple-decker," place the ham and one slice of cheese on one level, and the chicken and the other slice of cheese on the other).
6. Quarter the sandwich.
7. Use picks to hold the sandwich together for the remainder of the process.
8. Dip into the egg-milk batter.
9. Coat thoroughly but quickly, ensuring all sides are coated.
10. Drop into the hot oil (or strainer basket and place the basket into the oil).
11. Cook until golden brown.
12. Remove from the oil and drain on a paper towel.
13. Wrap the sandwich in a cloth towel.
14. Serve while hot.
This recipe pairs well with a fruit compote side dish.
